nasb.text: For not knowing about God’s righteousness and seeking to establish their own, they did not subject themselves to the righteousness of God.

esv.text: For, being ignorant of the righteousness of God, and seeking to establish their own, they did not submit to God’s righteousness.

cnv.text: 他們既然不明白　神的義，而又企圖建立自己的義，就不服　神的義了。

ccb.text: 他们不知道上帝所赐的义，想努力建立自己的义，不肯服从上帝的义。

csbs.text: 就是说，他们不明白神的义，想要确立自己的义，就不服从神的义了。
